articles.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
articles.description: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.

articles.title: Weight-loss drug Wegovy to be available in pill form in UK for first time
articles.description: Manufacturer Novo Nordisk says a daily tablet of the drug could be more convenient for some people than weekly injections.

articles.title: Police officer, 19, dies from crash injuries
articles.description: Jess Turnbull "had so much to look forward to in her career and her life", the chief constable says.

articles.title: Asylum appeal backlog at record high, new figures show
articles.description: While the government has cut the backlog of cases waiting for a decision, the number of appeals has risen.
